'''Morag's lair''' was a large castle atop [[Mount Thunderstone]] on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]]. It was protected by [[Yuzzum/Legends|Yuzzum]] guards, who were loyal to [[Morag]], the [[Tulgah/Legends|Tulgah]] [[Witch/Legends|witch]]. Morag used the lair as a base of operations for her many attacks against her sworn enemies, the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]]. During the final showdown between Morag and [[Shaman/Legends|Shaman]] [[Logray/Legends|Logray]], Morag destroyed her lair through the use of the [[Sunstar/Legends|Sunstar]], submerging her fortress in the lava of Mount Thunderstone.
